description: Legal document, laying out the genealogy and relationships within a family. Names mentioned include Mubāraka, Yiṣḥaq, and Yosef. Signed by Avraham b. Natan Av, Ṣadoq Av Bet Din or his son, Yoshiyya, and [Avra]ham b. Yiṣḥaq. On recto there are medical recipes recommended as diuretics and diaphoretics, and advice on diet. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
